# BP-132 variant positive: an id-based ExecContext ignores the affected count.
lang: go
file: BP-132-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: database-sql-id-update
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

func renameUser(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, id int) error {
	_, err := db.ExecContext(ctx, "UPDATE users SET display_name = ? WHERE id = ?", "Ada", id)
	return err
}
